name: Idaho Copper Corp
summary: Idaho Copper Corporation is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the CuMo Project, a large copper-molybdenum-silver deposit in Boise County, Idaho. The project comprises 126 federal unpatented lode mining claims and 6 patented mining claims covering approximately 2,640 acres. The company also identifies byproducts including tungsten and rhenium. A Preliminary Economic Assessment was completed in May 2020 by SRK Consulting (Canada) Inc.
